D:\ITMO\Cmake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\client_network_tests.dir/objects.a
D:\ITMO\gcc\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\client_network_tests.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\client_network_tests.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\ITMO\gcc\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\client_network_tests.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o client_network_tests.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libclient_network_tests.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\client_network_tests.dir\linkLibs.rsp
